description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a pair of trousers, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This  leather belt from timberland is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Made of textured leather for durability and styleTang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fit  CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
